title: BSCI:414 Lab 6 and Lab 7--Analyze RT-qPCR Results from COVID-19 Test
steps: Watch and discuss experimental video. https://youtu.be/9s5sACRqkZ8

Download screenshots and "Human.sample.chart.results.JPG" in our class folder, "Files>Lab Results>Lab 6 qPCR Data". qPCR threshold results for human saliva samples. Mastermix concentrations of probes and primers. Chart in bottom right corner is to SalivaDirect protocol, step 10.1 .

Calculate the concentration of plasmid DNA used to generate the standards. 7 plasmid standards were created. %s %s Our assay used the " nCoV-CDC-Control Plasmid " from Operon. The plasmid has been registered in Benchling. nCoV-CDC-Control Plasmid from Operon Serially diluted standards produce staggered inflections.
creator: Harley King
